title: Operator's Vanilla Enhanced
description: A slightly enhanced Vanilla experience with performance optimizations and some QoL mods
body:
Operator's Vanilla Enhanced is a modpack that aims to provide a mix of the standard Vanilla experience with some QoL features for more technical players.
Beside performance mods like Sodium and Lithium it also contains the CarpetMod and Tweakeroo.

With Iris and Better End Sky it also brings some (optional) additional eye candy.

The modpack is optional for clients so players without the pack still can play on servers with the pack.
